productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Tops
description: Composition Black short sleeve top made of 100% viscose, with a 100% polyester decoration on the left chest with lace and satin ribbon, round neck and a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Look steaming hot this season in this fabulous viscose top from united colors of benetton. The fabric flows well over your body, while the sleeves redefine your rounded arms. The lace, satin and polyester bow decoration on the left chest enhances the feminine elegance of this top. Team this with knee-length pencil skirts and heeled sandals for that graceful look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
